crime.value: Stalking and attempted sexual assault by unknown perpetrator
crime.quote: she would bet her life that she just heard someone walking around her cabin

victim.value: London, a isolated young woman living alone in a cabin who previously survived an attack
victim.quote: What was she going to do if someone was trying to hurt her again?

closed_world.value: London's isolated cabin and surrounding area
closed_world.quote: She was not going anywhere she never did.

investigator.value: London herself as the victim experiencing and trying to understand the threat
investigator.quote: She started to think who could it be?

red_herring.value: Initial peeping tom/voyeur misdirection before revealing serious assault threat
red_herring.quote: A teenager being a peeping tom or some weirdo with a sick fetish?

social_world.value: Isolated female victim dependent on police protection and family support network
social_world.quote: I will be finding this man that did this to my sister.

investigator_wound.value: Victim's previous trauma creates terror of repeat victimization
investigator_wound.quote: This Cannot Be Happening Again! What was she going to do if someone was trying to hurt her again?

_meta.title: ebook kimba sue this cannot be happening again
